title: Kharik Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kharik, with a Z-Score of +3.40. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kharik is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 77%, and the wind speed is 15.7 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The lack of cooling degree days, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, indicates that the heat wave will persist without any relief.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect the public.
